channel.title: GitHub Fennel Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Fennel in GitHub

item.title: nyoom-engineering/oxocarbon.nvim
item.description: A dark and light Neovim theme written in fennel, inspired by IBM Carbon.

item.title: Olical/conjure
item.description: Interactive evaluation for Neovim (Clojure, Fennel, Scheme, Python, JavaScript, PHP, R, Lua, Rust and more!)
